name: Nature RPG!
description:
A mini project of mine specifically as you being a bug(YEA),You can be an ant of a ant colony or a bee of a bee hive

Enjoy!

Not sure why you guys don’t like nature bots

Also don’t say things like “I want to be a bird” because it’ll break the bot and make it go like those “as a chair I can confirm this”
creator: Zephyrjoins
